name: signal-garden
description: Daily community relay puzzle prototype built with Phaser.

scripts.build:devvit: npm run build:devvit:client && npm run build:devvit:server
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:devvit
scripts.test: node tests/puzzle.test.mjs && node tests/share.test.mjs && node tests/launchPacket.test.mjs && node tests/exportLaunchPacketCli.test.mjs && node tests/serverAdapter.test.mjs && node tests/communityClient.test.mjs && node tests/localArchive.test.mjs && node tests/audio.test.mjs && node tests/redisProposalStore.test.mjs && node tests/devvitServerShell.test.mjs && node tests/devvitSplash.test.mjs
scripts.check: node --check vite.config.js && node --check vite.devvit.client.config.js && node --check vite.devvit.server.config.js && node --check src/audio.js && node --check src/share.js && node --check src/launchPacket.js && node --check src/client/communityClient.js && node --check src/devvit/client/game-entry.js && node --check src/devvit/client/splash.js && node --check src/devvit/server/index.js && node --check src/game/seeded.js && node --check src/game/puzzle.js && node --check src/game/proposals.js && node --check src/game/SignalGardenScene.js && node --check src/server/memoryProposalStore.js && node --check src/server/redisProposalStore.js && node --check src/server/signalGardenApi.js && node --check src/state/browserProposalStore.js && node --check src/state/store.js && node --check src/ui.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check scripts/audit-local.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-devvit-shell.mjs && node --check scripts/audit-submission-assets.mjs && node --check scripts/export-launch-packet.mjs && node --check scripts/record-demo.mjs && node --check tests/audio.test.mjs && node --check tests/share.test.mjs && node --check tests/launchPacket.test.mjs && node --check tests/exportLaunchPacketCli.test.mjs && node --check tests/puzzle.test.mjs && node --check tests/serverAdapter.test.mjs && node --check tests/communityClient.test.mjs && node --check tests/localArchive.test.mjs && node --check tests/redisProposalStore.test.mjs && node --check tests/devvitServerShell.test.mjs && node --check tests/devvitSplash.test.mjs
